content: AMS program metrics: 1) Process measures: antibiotic time-out completion, guideline adherence, IV-to-PO conversion rates; 2) Outcome measures: Days of Therapy (DOT) per 1,000 patient-days (preferred over defined daily doses), resistance rates (MRSA, VRE, CRE, ESBL), C. difficile infection rates, adverse drug events; 3) Balancing measures: clinical cure rates, readmissions, mortality (ensure stewardship doesn't compromise care). Antibiotic Spectrum Index quantifies collateral damage. Benchmarking against NHSN data. Economic impact: reduced drug costs offset by personnel; overall cost savings from prevented adverse events and shorter LOS. Diagnostic accuracy metrics: appropriate culture collection before antibiotics, rapid test utilization. Stewardship ROI demonstrated in multiple studies through reduced consumption without increased complications.
